game.name: Cabal
game.desc: É um jogo de tiro com visão de terceira pessoa, no qual controla tanto a sua personagem como um dispositivo de pontaria. O objectivo é, evidentemente, matar o maior número possível de inimigos sem ser atingido. Se não parecer óbvio no início controlar tanto o seu guerreiro como o seu tiro, a ergonomia revela-se intuitiva e bem ajustada após alguns minutos.

game.name: Tube-it
game.desc: Cachat is a very challenging puzzle game where you must complete a line from one electrode along the sides to another, same side or other side. Blocks fall from the top of the screen, but if they reach the top of the playing area, the game is over. This mind-blowing fast game is very highly addictive. The gameplay is quite easy but requires a lot of attention.

game.name: Saboten Bombers
game.desc:
A platform game with gameplay similar to Snow Bros. and Bubble Bobble.
Saboten Bombers is a single screen platform game. The gameplay consists of throwing bombs at the enemies, and avoiding being hit by the enemy bombs. There are a variety of enemies and colorful backgrounds. The game has over 50 levels, and also a versus mode. The game has many collectables, the most notable of which is the cake which gives the player an extra life after collecting 8 pieces.

game.name: Cadash
game.desc: Four great heroes: a fighter, a wizard, a cleric and a ninja go on a quest to rescue the captured princess. This Taito adventure game feature all the ingredients of a traditional role-playing game (stats, exp, buy upgrade in store...).

game.name: Cadillacs and Dinosaurs
game.desc: Cadillacs and Dinosaurs é um jogo de beat 'em up para arcade lançado em 1993 pela Capcom e baseado nos quadrinhos Xenozoic Tales de Mark Schultz. Após inúmeros desastres naturais causados pela poluição, a humanidade entra em colapso e os sobreviventes são obrigados a viver por séculos em cidades subterrâneas. Ao voltar para a superfície, no ano de 2513, os humanos descobrem que a Terra foi repovoada por dinossauros, que a princípio eram dóceis e conviviam de forma pacífica com os humanos, até que começaram a sofrer ataques de uma gangue chamada Black Marketers, que caçavam os dinossauros e cometiam outras atrocidades sem motivo aparente. Isso fez com que os dinossauros se tornassem hostis com os humanos e começassem a atacar povoados. A fim de colocar as coisas em ordem novamente, Jack Tenrec, Hannah Dundee, Mustapha Cairo e Mess O'Bradovich decidem juntar-se contra as ações dos Black Marketers e iniciam uma busca aos membros da gangue e seus líderes.

game.name: Cadillacs and Dinosaurs
game.desc: Cadillacs and Dinosaurs é um jogo de beat 'em up para arcade lançado em 1993 pela Capcom e baseado nos quadrinhos Xenozoic Tales de Mark Schultz. Após inúmeros desastres naturais causados pela poluição, a humanidade entra em colapso e os sobreviventes são obrigados a viver por séculos em cidades subterrâneas. Ao voltar para a superfície, no ano de 2513, os humanos descobrem que a Terra foi repovoada por dinossauros, que a princípio eram dóceis e conviviam de forma pacífica com os humanos, até que começaram a sofrer ataques de uma gangue chamada Black Marketers, que caçavam os dinossauros e cometiam outras atrocidades sem motivo aparente. Isso fez com que os dinossauros se tornassem hostis com os humanos e começassem a atacar povoados. A fim de colocar as coisas em ordem novamente, Jack Tenrec, Hannah Dundee, Mustapha Cairo e Mess O'Bradovich decidem juntar-se contra as ações dos Black Marketers e iniciam uma busca aos membros da gangue e seus líderes.

game.name: Cadillacs and Dinosaurs

game.name: Twinkle Star Sprites
game.desc: Twinklestar Sprites no Neo Geo é um shoot'em up cuja ação intensa contrasta com um estilo gráfico fofo e colorido. Separados por uma barra vertical, dois jogadores se enfrentam em um duelo (humano contra humano ou CPU) e devem eliminar uma série de inimigos o mais rápido possível para enviar bolas de fogo para a área do oponente.

game.name: Caliber 50
game.desc:
O Calibre Fifty é um jogo de rolagem multidirecional para um ou dois jogadores que assumem o papel de pilotos americanos capturados que foram feitos prisioneiros durante a guerra do Vietnã em 1972. Os pilotos devem escapar do complexo da prisão lutando contra soldados inimigos e veículos, incluindo aviões tanques e helicópteros.
O jogo é muito parecido com os jogos Ikari e Heavy Barrel da SNK, com jogadores capazes de girar completamente seus personagens na tela para disparar e se mover em todas as direções. Os jogadores estão inicialmente armados com uma metralhadora e um número limitado de granadas, mas power-ups - incluindo um lançador de foguetes, um lança-chamas e granadas - podem ser encontrados nas caixas de madeira destrutíveis que estão espalhadas pelos palcos.
Veículos inimigos como um avião também podem ser controlados e os estágios ocorrem tanto acima do solo nas selvas vietnamitas quanto abaixo do solo em túneis ocultos. Calibre Fifty é um jogo bastante curto, mas muito desafiador, com inimigos que constantemente geram ataques de todos os lados.

game.name: Calipso
game.desc: You play a diver who is trying to get a treasure. Hold Fire and push in the direction you want to shoot, but you will be unable to move while doing this. Shoot the sea animals and the other player. Try to get the treasure at the bottom and return it to the boat at the top without getting attacked by sea creatures -- all before your air runs out.

game.name: Calorie Kun Vs Moguranian
game.desc: Calorie Kun vs Moguranian is a traditional platforms and ladders game in which the player controls an abstract, mole-like creature that must make its way around a number of underground tunnels, avoiding enemies and collecting the items placed around the screen; before quickly making its way to the exit. The player is armed with a limited number of bombs that can be used to destroy or disable enemies.

game.name: Calorie Kun Vs Moguranian
game.desc: Calorie Kun vs Moguranian is a traditional platforms and ladders game in which the player controls an abstract, mole-like creature that must make its way around a number of underground tunnels, avoiding enemies and collecting the items placed around the screen; before quickly making its way to the exit. The player is armed with a limited number of bombs that can be used to destroy or disable enemies.

game.name: Cameltry
game.desc:
In Cameltry the player must guide a ball through a number of mazes, rotating the maze through 180 degrees to get the ball to move in the desired direction - much like the bonus levels in the Sega Genesis/Mega Drive console title, "Sonic the Hedgehog". Each maze must be completed within a tight time limit and a number of traps and obstacles litter the mazes to slow players down.
There are, however, a number of positive targets to be hit, and bonuses - such as additional time - can be found hidden away within the mazes. When the ball is stuck or the player would like to speed up, the JUMP button can be used. If the player runs out of time before reaching the goal, a random matching game is run to allow the player more time to complete the maze. This challenge, however is very difficult to win.

game.name: Cameltry
game.desc:

game.name: Ponpoko
game.desc:
Ponpoko é um jogo de arcade lançado em 1982 pela Sigma Enterprises. É um jogo de plataforma semelhante ao Donkey Kong e Mario Bros.
Em Ponpoko, o jogador controla um Tanuki (um cão-guaxinim japonês) que pode subir escadas, atravessar pisos e pular espaços e tachas enquanto tenta evitar cobras vermelhas e amarelas. O jogador deve coletar todas as frutas e legumes para avançar para o próximo nível. Há também cestas que contêm pontos ou cobras. Quando o nível final for alcançado (o nível da caneca de cerveja), o jogo repetirá esse nível infinitamente.

game.name: Candy Candy
game.desc: It's a puzzle game where you move the board around in angles and let gravity drop the chips and when the same color chips line up, they disappear like in Tetris. It's not too bad but the difficulty level does seem to ramp right up quite quickly.

game.name: Cannon Ball
game.desc:
This game is like a crossover between "Arkanoid" and "Puzzle Bobble". You have a paddle and must shoot the ball trying to match with the same color balls on the descending balls. If you connect three or more balls in the same color they will disappear. After the balls disappear, any balls that become detached from the descending structure also disappear. Balls can be shot in three directions: 45 degrees to the left, 45 degrees to the right, or strait up. If you are in difficult situation, you can shoot a bomb.
Once you clear a set number of disappearances, the stage is cleared and the player is rewarded with a digitized photo image of an Asian girl in her underwear. Each stage features a different picture with a different girl.
If the descending balls reach the players paddle, then the game is over. If you continue you restart at previous stage.

game.name: Cannon Ball
game.desc:
This game is like a crossover between "Arkanoid" and "Puzzle Bobble". You have a paddle and must shoot the ball trying to match with the same color balls on the descending balls. If you connect three or more balls in the same color they will disappear. After the balls disappear, any balls that become detached from the descending structure also disappear. Balls can be shot in three directions: 45 degrees to the left, 45 degrees to the right, or strait up. If you are in difficult situation, you can shoot a bomb.
Once you clear a set number of disappearances, the stage is cleared and the player is rewarded with a digitized photo image of an Asian girl in her underwear. Each stage features a different picture with a different girl.
If the descending balls reach the players paddle, then the game is over. If you continue you restart at previous stage.

game.name: Cannon Ball
game.desc: Cannon Ball is a game similar to Breakout except with a twist. Instead of having to clear all of the bricks, you have to destroy a "bat" being protected by all of the bricks. The "bat" tries to kill you by throwing monsters at you which, if hit by one, your paddle shrinks. Once your paddle is invisible, you get a game over. You can also eat the monsters by ramming into one once they are on your playing field.

game.name: Osman
game.desc:
Osman é um jogo de plataforma de ação com rolagem lateral produzido pela Mitchell Corp., lançado exclusivamente para fliperamas em 1996. Muitos ex-funcionários da Capcom, incluindo Kouichi Yotsui (creditado como Isuke), trabalharam na versão arcade original de Strider e projetaram Osman como um sequência não oficial de Strider. Yotsui dirigiu os dois títulos.
Em contraste com o cenário futurista cazaque-soviético de Strider, Osman se passa em um cenário árabe cyberpunk iluminado por neon, enquanto Strider Hiryu é substituído por um protagonista do Oriente Médio chamado Kirin, que luta sem armas.O enredo bizarro do jogo supostamente zomba da experiência do diretor Kouichi Yotsui na Capcom depois de Strider.
É o final do século XXI e o mundo está sob o controle de um único governo federal. Um dia, uma nova ameaça conhecida como Abdullah, o Escravo, aparece, causando terror e pânico generalizados. O medo no coração dos homens incita ao abandono de toda atividade econômica. O governo federal, que é a base do capitalismo e da civilização moderna, tornou-se nada menos que uma idéia insidiosa que corrompe os fundamentos da própria sociedade. Destrói as idiossincrasias e variações entre os pontos de vista nacionais, sufocando-os em nome da "liberdade" e de seus próprios ideais internos.
Só o diretor de assuntos judiciais, Jack Layzon, entende a situação, temendo o pior. Ele convoca o assassino solitário que dominou o 'estilo secreto' ...

game.name: Canvas Croquis
game.desc:
An adult maze game.
We play as painter while painting his great canvas of beautiful females, but his task will not be easy, because it is constantly attacked by annoying enemies, you must eliminate or dodge all enemies of the maze to complete the canvas and go to the next stage.

game.name: Canyon Bomber
game.desc: Canyon Bomber is a 2-D shooter. You control either the blimp or the plane while dropping bombs on the rocks below. Your goal is to get the highest amount of points (either against the computer or another player). You are allowed so many misses before your game ends. Misses are counted as the times you do not hit any rocks. The scores for the rocks are directly proportional to the difficulty in hitting those rocks. This game boils down to precision bombing and thinking ahead as to where the next bomb will fall. Good luck in taking out all of the rocks in the canyon.

game.name: Canyon Bomber
game.desc: Canyon Bomber is a 2-D shooter. You control either the blimp or the plane while dropping bombs on the rocks below. This game boils down to precision bombing and thinking ahead as to where the next bomb will fall. Good luck in taking out all of the rocks in the canyon.

game.name: Capcom Bowling
game.desc: Este jogo de downhill bowling permite que até quatro jogadores possam competir. A trackball controla o alvo e a potência do seu lançamento e dois botões controlam o gancho esquerdo e direito respectivamente. Há exibições gráficas de perus, bifurcações, calhas, etc. e o jogo mantém o controle de pontuações e pontuações altas.

game.name: Capcom Bowling
game.desc: Este jogo de downhill bowling permite que até quatro jogadores possam competir. game.name: Capcom Sports Club
game.desc: Capcom Sports Club é um jogo de arcade lançado pela Capcom em 1997. É um jogo multi-esportivo que consiste em Smash Stars (Ténis), Dunk Stars (Basquete) e Kick Stars (Futebol).

game.name: Capcom Sports Club
game.desc: Capcom Sports Club é um jogo de arcade lançado pela Capcom em 1997. É um jogo multi-esportivo que consiste em Smash Stars (Ténis), Dunk Stars (Basquete) e Kick Stars (Futebol).

game.name: Adventure Quiz: Capcom World
game.desc:
A princesa do reino da Capcom foi raptada, e o herói deve passar por seis mundos para salvá-la. No final de cada mundo você enfrenta um personagem da Capcom.
Prima um dos quatro botões para ver quantos espaços você vai mover. Quando você pousar em um espaço, você terá que responder perguntas antes que seu oponente faça ou o tempo se esgote. Se você responder ao número necessário de perguntas, você pode seguir em frente.

game.name: Pleiads
game.desc:
Pleiads is a 2-D, space shooter style game. With its many interesting visual and audio effects, this game is sure to challenge the most avid player.
Each round of play includes 4 different stages. With the onset of the melodious background tune, the first stage of play begins.
Against a backdrop of planets and twinkling stars, the Earth City must be protected from sixteen attacking Martians. These Martian attackers have the ability to transform from flying Martians, to walking Martians, or to UFOs. The walking Martians build barriers across the Earth City. These barriers must be destroyed.

game.name: Captain America And The Avengers
game.desc: A side-scrolling beat'em up (punctuated with occasional shoot'em up sections) in which one or more players take on the role of either Captain America, Iron Man, Vision, or Hawkeye as they prepare to do battle with Red Skull and his henchmen. Each player character has a different weapon or power that can be used throughout the game to assist them in combat. Captain America uses his shield, Iron Man uses his repulsor rays, Vision uses his solar beam and Hawkeye uses his bow and arrows. There are also additional superheroes such as Quicksilver, Sub-Mariner, Wonder Man, and The Wasp who appear at certain points in the game to assist the player characters. Some of the super-villain foes that await the heroes are Klaw, The Living Laser, Whirlwind, The Grim Reaper, The Wizard, The Controllers, The Mandarin, The Juggernaut (from X-Men), Ultron and Crossbones. The game consists of all five stages.

game.name: Captain America And The Avengers
game.desc: A side-scrolling beat'em up (punctuated with occasional shoot'em up sections) in which one or more players take on the role of either Captain America, Iron Man, Vision, or Hawkeye as they prepare to do battle with Red Skull and his henchmen. game.name: Captain Commando
game.desc: Captain Commando se passa em futuro assustador no ano de 2026, onde um super-herói chamado Capitão Comando, auxiliado por seus três companheiros de comando, se levanta para proteger a Terra e toda a Galáxia de um bando de criminosos superpotentes.

game.name: Car Jamboree
game.desc:
A one or two player Driving/Demolition game.
Drive your car thru demolition tracks. You must crash the rivals' cars and dodge their attacks, always avoiding colliding with the walls and different obstacles in the track, while you jump off ramps in this challenge of demolition derby!

game.name: Carnival
game.desc: Simulando um jogo de tiro de parque de diversões, Carnival tem como objetivo atirar com uma pistola nos coelhos, patos e outros alvos que percorrem a tela. O título é jogado como um shoot 'em up convencional, mas com um elemento incomum no gênero: munição limitada.

game.name: Carnival
game.desc: Simulando um jogo de tiro de parque de diversões, Carnival tem como objetivo atirar com uma pistola nos coelhos, patos e outros alvos que percorrem a tela. O título é jogado como um shoot 'em up convencional, mas com um elemento incomum no gênero: munição limitada.

game.name: Carrier Air Wing
game.desc: A década de 1990 foi uma década de grande mudança marcada por amizades crescentes entre antigos inimigos e um nível de cooperação nunca antes visto entre as nações poderosas do mundo. No entanto, em 1997, usando novas armas projetadas em segredo, um país do Oriente Médio chamado Rabu ameaçou destruir esta frágil paz. O objetivo de Rabu, junto com seus aliados, é expurgar o mundo do pecado e forçar uma nova moralidade. Rabu rapidamente reivindicou o Oriente Médio, então espalhou-se tanto no sul da Ásia e partes da Europa. Seu armamento é terrivelmente eficiente na manufatura da morte. Eles pareciam imparáveis. Quando eles intoxicaram Tóquio com gás em 1999, a intervenção dos EUA tornou-se inevitável. Se Rabu conseguir utilizar as fábricas do Japão, não haverá fim para o pesadelo. Esperando proteger a paz mundial, o USS Carl Vinson (CVN-70) dirige-se para o mar.

game.name: Casanova
game.desc: Casanova is a Mahjong-like game made by Promat with girls. You play as a boy who wants to attract girls (hence the name casanova) and the coinup screen is actually the reason this games' plot exists. The boy is bored, so he decides to watch some TV. Finding nothing good until he finds a channel with girls dancing to the beat of a song that goes "Come on WHOO!" (Which might be an actual song). Then the boy thinks "I gotta get girls like these!" and gets up to find women lke the dancers. He then finds this palace of buildings named such as "The Girl's" and "WELCOM LADIES", and the spelling/grammar is slightly off as that's how it appears in-game. To get to the girls, the boy must solve puzzles in order to see their glory. In true fashion, this game is pretty much Mahjong with a couple tweaks and of course, girls. There is a "special move" that makes a dancing super-hero figure show up for a little bit, then a missile drops down on the mahjong board, removing random tiles from the board. While this all happens, one of the songs from a 1970's Beach music EP plays (which I can't remember the name of and I'm too lazy to shazam). Once you complete a level, you get to see part of a girls' body.

game.name: Cash Quiz
game.desc: A quiz game. Test your knowledge from a wide range of categories.

game.name: Catacomb
game.desc: An early vertical shooter.

game.name: Combat
game.desc:
A shooting game with a military motif. The player uses a gun, mounted to the cabinet, to protect allies from a variety of dangers while attempting to break through and conquer enemy lines and get promoted to a higher rank (from Private to General Of The Army) and be awarded a campaign medal.
This game was known under Combat or Catch-22

game.name: Puck Man
game.desc: Puckman is the seminal and hugely influential arcade game in which the player guides the legendary Puckman around a single-screen maze eating dots. Puckman is constantly pursued in his task by four colored ghosts. Each ghost has its own unique personality and behavioural patterns and a single touch from any of the ghosts results in Puckman losing a life. When all of Puckman's lives are lost, the game is over.

game.name: Magical Cat Adventure
game.desc: In this game you play as a magical cat wandering around a forest. This game features some very nice/appealing graphics. The cat has many strange weapons.

game.name: Cavelon
game.desc: In this horizontally-scrolling maze game, You the heroic knight must reach the top floor of Castle Cavelon, rescue a fair maiden and do battle with the Black Wizard! Armed with bow and arrow and a magic sword, you must avoid or kill the castle security guards while collecting the 8 pieces of the exit door that are scattered around the corridors, in order to proceed to the next floor.

game.name: Caveman Ninja
game.desc:
Caveman Ninja é um beat-em-up de plataforma de rolagem horizontal, ambientado em tempos pré-históricos, com um ou dois jogadores assumindo o papel de homens das cavernas Joe e Mac. Homens das cavernas rivais invadiram a vila de Joe e Mac e sequestraram todas as suas mulheres e cabe aos dois heróis se aventurar e salvá-los.
Joe e Mac devem lutar por vários estágios pré-históricos, combatendo homens das cavernas e dinossauros saqueadores. Os heróis estão inicialmente armados com eixos de arremesso que podem ser lançados vertical ou horizontalmente, viajando em um arco curto. Pressionando o botão de ataque, armas maiores e mais poderosas serão lançadas. Quando perto de um inimigo, Joe e Mac irão utilizar um taco de madeira para bater nele. Os jogadores também podem pular muito mais alto, mantendo UP e JUMP.

game.name: Centipede
game.desc:
Centipede is a vertically oriented single screen shoot-em-up in which the aim is to use the 'Bug Blaster' to shoot the centipedes that snake down towards the bottom of the screen to amass as high a score as possible.
The play-field is littered with randomly placed mushrooms and the rapidly descending Centipede changes direction when it runs into a mushroom. When a segment of the Centipede is shot, the segment is destroyed and a mushroom appears in its place, the Centipede then breaks into two smaller centipedes, each with its own head, and continues its descent.
Players can move the Bug Blaster vertically as well as horizontally, although only for the lower fifth of the play-field. Mushrooms can also be shot for points and to clear blocked areas. Once a Centipede reaches the bottom of the screen, it starts snaking back up, but remains within the lower section of the play-field near the player's Bug Blaster.
Additionally, any Centipede that reaches the very bottom of the screen without being shot releases its tail section which then becomes a new head. Other new heads also enter the screen from the bottom corners of the play-field as time progresses.
Randomly moving Spiders also appear in the first wave. Spiders can destroy any mushrooms they move over, eliminating many mushroom targets for a player. If the Bug Blaster and a Spider collide, both are destroyed. the Spider either moves at a 45-degree angle or vertically up and down, never simply left or right like the centipede does.
A bombardment of Fleas appears from the second wave onward. As a Flea descends, it leaves a trail of new mushrooms behind it. Fleas appear when a certain number of mushrooms remains at the bottom of the screen. This number increases as the game progresses, meaning Fleas appear more often later on in the game. The Bug Blaster must hit a Flea twice to destroy it; the first shot simply speeds up its descent.
When a Centipede with fewer than eleven segments appears, a Scorpion enters from either side, moving at a relatively slow speed. As the player earns more points, the Scorpion's speed increases. As the Scorpion travels across the screen, it 'poisons' the mushrooms that it moves over and changes their colours. These mushrooms cause any Centipedes that would collide with them to head straight towards the bottom of the screen, rather than continue snaking left and right. The Bug Blaster can stop a poisoned Centipede by shooting its head.
If a player earns at least 60,000 points, two things happen to increase the challenge: the Fleas descend at a faster speed and the Spiders restrict their movement to a smaller area at the bottom of the screen.

game.name: Chack'n Pop
game.desc: Chack'n Pop é um jogo de ação. Você joga como um pequeno personagem amarelo capaz de andar nas paredes e atirar bombas. Você deve coletar todos os ovos do mesmo nível e eliminar todos os inimigos para passar para o próximo.

game.name: Chain Reaction
game.desc: Chain Reaction (known in Japan as Magical Drop) is a tile-matching puzzle game developed and released by Data East for arcades throughout 1995. Chain Reaction is known for its cute art style (with characters based on tarot cards) and two-player competitive gameplay. Players control a little clown at the bottom of their playfields and try to arrange groups of tiles to make them disappear before a tile reaches past the bottom of the playfield. This is done by pulling down similar tiles (and throwing them back up) to match.

game.name: Chameleon
game.desc:
A colourful platform game in which the player controls a long-tongued chameleon that must make around a series of single-screen, platform-strewn levels; stealing chicken eggs from their nests and being careful to avoid contact with angry chickens.
As well as walking along the platforms and poles, the chameleon can use its tongue to pull itself up to higher platforms; and to escape from any nearby chickens. Each level also has a number of bombs placed at various points; the chameleon can hit these with its tongue to send them crashing towards nearby chickens. The player must keep an eye out for projectiles thrown by the chickens, such as flashing eggs.
If the nesting eggs are left for too long, they will hatch into a baby chick. The player can eat the chick for bonus points, but if the chick is left alone for too long, it will grow into an adult chicken and start attacking the player.
A level is over once all of the eggs have been collected and all of the chickens killed.

game.name: Champion Wrestler
game.desc: Eight original wrestlers fight for glory, money and win the title belt of TWF circuit in a single or tag-team match.

game.name: Champion Wrestler
game.desc: Eight original wrestlers fight for glory, money and win the title belt of TWF circuit in a single or tag-team match.

game.name: Champion Wrestler
game.desc: Eight original wrestlers fight for glory, money and win the title belt of TWF circuit in a single or tag-team match.

game.name: Chanbara
game.desc: Set in feudal japan, you play as a student samurai, and breakthrough to defend the dojo temple with his katana, waging battles to death against their enemies brandishing harmoniously his sharp sword katana and jumping while avoid being cut by the enemy weapon some enemies hooded attacking from above dodge his attacks to win and move forward through levels to keep the Bushido code and protect the dojo.

game.name: Chance Kun
game.desc: A one player game of gambling bet based on a baseball game, starring by fun cats.

game.name: Change Air Blade
game.desc: Change Air Blade is a 2D vertical scrolling shooter, based on a "boss rush" idea. The player can select one from eight different ships (each ship has its own special form), and fights against another ships. Basically, each normal enemy is boss, with a long life bar, and has support from smaller minions. The player has the main gun and several bombs to use, and must win an air duel with the boss to progress.

game.name: Changes
game.desc:
This maze game is quite similar to "Pac-Man". The player controls a caterpillar that crawls along the branches of a maze-like tree eating nuts and strawberries while avoiding deadly bugs and a hungry bird. The caterpillar changes into a butterfly after everything has been eaten.
The caterpillar must eat all the strawberries and nuts on each level to become a butterfly. Eating a strawberry temporarily makes the caterpillar invincible allowing it to kill the deadly bugs and score 400 bonus points ber bug. If the caterpillar remains still for too long, an invincible owl (replaced by an invincible bat in later levels) will appear. If your catepillar moves, the owl or bat will disappear. If your catepillar remains still, the invincible owl or bat will chase the caterpillar, albiet not very effrctively.
When the caterpillar crosses over a pivot branch, all the branches will rotate at once, and any bugs that are on those branches will fall off and score 400, 800, 1600 and 3200 points, depending on the amount of bugs killed. Keep an eye out for the flowers that will appear below the house - they will reward you between 400 and 3200 points, depending on the level.

game.name: Charlie Ninja
game.desc:
A colourful, 1 or 2-player platform shoot-em-up consisting of 5 stages, in which the player controls a Ninja who must jump and shoot his way through each of the game's stages, before taking on the archetypal end-of-level 'Boss'.
Bonuses can be picked up to increase the firepower, and barrels can either be smashed to reveal bonuses, or picked up and thrown at the enemies. In addition; the Ninja can perform high jump by pressing the JUMP button, then pressing it again while the Ninja is in the air. This is useful for avoiding enemies and essential for reaching high platforms.

game.name: Chase Bombers
game.desc:
WELCOME TO THE CUSTOMIZED CAR CARNIVAL!
Choose your Vehicle and one of the challenging race courses. Rev your engine and get ready to roll. Be carefull there are mines and steel poles as obstacles to slow you down. Rival racers attack and obstruct you must avoid the traps and to use your advantage and pick on the Item Gate to use your specialized arsenal to crash the enemy drivers and race for the checkered flag!

game.desc:
WELCOME TO THE CUSTOMIZED CAR CARNIVAL!
Choose your Vehicle and one of the challenging race courses. Rev your engine and get ready to roll. Be carefull there are mines and steel poles as obstacles to slow you down. Rival racers attack and obstruct you must avoid the traps and to use your advantage and pick on the Item Gate to use your specialized arsenal to crash the enemy drivers and race for the checkered flag!

game.name: Chase H.Q.
game.desc: "Chase H.Q." é um jogo de corrida e perseguição no qual o jogador assume o papel de um polícia infiltrado chamado Tony Gibson neste jogo inspirado no "Miami Vice" de Taito. Gibson conduz um poderoso carro policial sem marca (parecido com um Porsche 911) com o seu parceiro, "Raymond Broady", e deve perseguir e prender vários criminosos.O jogador tem entre cinquenta e cinco e setenta segundos (dependendo da configuração 'Dip' do jogo) para apanhar o criminoso em fuga, e depois o mesmo tempo para bater novamente no carro do criminoso até que este esteja demasiado danificado para avançar. O carro do criminoso está constantemente a afastar-se, por isso, se o jogador bater repetidamente ou conduzir demasiado devagar, o criminoso irá escapar e o jogo termina.

game.name: Check Man
game.desc: Check Man is an arcade game where the player moves a man around a grid made up of squares that disappear after being walked over. The aim of each level is to defuse a number bombs which is done by simply moving over them. Each bomb has a counter and it is necessary to defuse them before the time runs out. The quicker the bombs are defused the more points will be earned. At the same time the player has to watch out for the stomping boots that move around the grid. Any contact with these will lead to the player getting killed and a life will be lost. In addition to bombs and boots there are also skulls which are stationary obstacles and flags which give bonus points. It is possible to slide the row of squares the player is standing on left or right as long as there is space left and the objects are not moved off the edge of the screen.

game.name: Check Man

game.name: Cheeky Mouse
game.desc: Try to hit the mouse with a hammer when it comes out from one of many holes in the wall. The mouse is trying to get from its hole to the cheese on the other side of the house.

game.name: Cheese Chase
game.desc: Fantasy is a little mouse looking for delicious cheeses. But it has to kill its enemies (rats and beetles) with mines exploding after a few seconds. Fantasy uses rotating wood doors and activated metal doors to follow its way escaping from sparks or ice. Really funny, "Cheese Chase" is a mix of reflex and strategy.

game.name: My Hero
game.desc: My Hero é um jogo de beat-'em-up bastante básico, em que o objetivo é viajar para a direita, socando e chutando inimigos enquanto tenta não ser atingido muitas vezes. Eventualmente, você chegará a uma clareira e terá que lutar contra um chefe - derrotá-lo brevemente o reunirá com sua namorada, antes que ela seja sequestrada novamente. O jogo faz um loop indefinidamente e termina quando o jogador fica sem vida.

game.name: Chequered Flag
game.desc:
Chequered Flag is an overhead-view racing game featuring rotational sprite scaling. The player races over a series of twisting courses, trying to reach the finish line before the timer expires.
The game includes a Pit-stop facility, a feature that had appeared a year earlier in Taito's "Continental Circus". Should the player's car sustain too much damage, a pit-stop must be made to implement repairs. A 'damage meter' at the bottom of the screen shows the severity of the damage; highlighting what car components are in need of repair; Engine, Front Tires, Rear Tires and Brakes.

game.name: Chequered Flag
game.desc:
Chequered Flag is an overhead-view racing game featuring rotational sprite scaling. The player races over a series of twisting courses, trying to reach the finish line before the timer expires.

Should the player's car sustain too much damage, a pit-stop must be made to implement repairs. A 'damage meter' at the bottom of the screen shows the severity of the damage; highlighting what car components are in need of repair; Engine, Front Tires, Rear Tires and Brakes.

game.name: Cheyenne
game.desc: A first-person shoot'em up game, with a western motif. The player uses a gun (mounted to the cabinet) to escort the sheriff through a variety of dangers, gathering bounty for capturing criminals. There are 7 levels or scenes plus the bonus level:

game.name: Mahjong Gakuen
game.desc: Mahjong game played against various girls. This must be the extra-curricular activities of the Mahjong Academy students.

game.name: Chibi Marukochan Deluxe Quiz
game.desc: Um jogo de quiz japonês baseado em uma série de mangá/anime!

game.name: Mega Twins
game.desc: Mega Twins, também conhecido como Chiki Chiki Boys, é um jogo de ação de rolagem lateral lançado para os arcades pela Capcom em 1990. Foi o décimo jogo lançado para o hardware do Sistema CP. O jogo conta com dois gêmeos que estão tentando retomar o controle de sua terra, Alurea, depois que um monstro inesperadamente ataca, destruindo tudo em seu caminho. O povo de Alurea viveu em paz por mil anos e esqueceu-se de lutar, mas os únicos sobreviventes da terra, os filhos gêmeos do rei, devem assumir o desafio e devolver o seu reino à sua antiga glória. Os dois gêmeos, com cerca de 15 anos no momento em que o jogo acontece, se aventurar em busca de uma pedra lendária conhecida como "Dragon Blue Eyes", as quais existem rumores de serem capaz de colocar tudo de volta ao lugar.

game.name: Chiller
game.desc: This is a gun game, and there are four different screens (plus two different bonus screens). The object is simply to shoot everything in sight (and to try and locate any hidden targets on the screen). The game is based on time, and the timer moves faster when you are shooting poorly. The first screen is a torture chamber. There are four (still living) human targets on this screen. From left to right they are; a man chained to the wall, a person in a guillotine (shoot the top of the guillotine to decapitate them), a woman strapped in a strange machine, and a man in a head vise (shoot the vise to crush his head). The rest of the room is strewn with blood and loose body parts. You don't simply shoot each target once, instead you shoot each part of the target, which reduces that part to a mess of blood and bones.

game.name: Chimera Beast
game.desc: Um tiro de rolagem horizontal, onde 1 ou 2 jogadores controlam criaturas conhecidas como 'comedores', capazes de comer outras criaturas e pegar seu DNA, adquirindo suas habilidades ou características.

game.name: Chimera Beast
game.desc: Um tiro de rolagem horizontal, onde 1 ou 2 jogadores controlam criaturas conhecidas como 'comedores', capazes de comer outras criaturas e pegar seu DNA, adquirindo suas habilidades ou características.

game.name: China Gate
game.desc: China Gate is a 2D side-scrolling beat 'em-up game with platform elements for one or two players. The game offers a roster of three characters to choose from who have to recover a stolen book. These are the monkey man Gocoo, pig man Hakai and bird man Gojou. There are 3 buttons, one to jump, another to attack and another for power-ups. There is a limited time to defeat the numerous enemies that appear and jump through the platforms to harm the player. At the end of each level there is final boss. It is possible to obtain power-ups like beams that neutralize all the visible enemies of the screen.

game.name: China Town
game.desc: A very refreshing combination of Tetris and mahjong; the object is to complete a mahjong hand by getting correct tiles next to each other.

game.name: Chinese Hero
game.desc: Chinese Hero is a cute kung-fu action game with an overhead view. Lee and Loo must save the princess from 24 evil villains (only 12 in an 1-player game).

game.name: Chinese Hero
game.desc: Chinese Hero is a cute kung-fu action game with an overhead view. Lee and Loo must save the princess from 24 evil villains (only 12 in an 1-player game).

game.name: Chinese Hero
game.desc: Chinese Hero is a cute kung-fu action game with an overhead view. Lee and Loo must save the princess from 24 evil villains (only 12 in an 1-player game).

game.name: Choky! Choky!
game.desc: Yet another clone of Buster Brothers / Pang! / Pomping World - this one featuring low-budget music and sound effects, and split-screen competitive two-player action, somewhat reminiscent of Twinkle Star Sprites.

game.name: Choplifter
game.desc: Choplifter é um jogo de ação / arcade de rolagem lateral que coloca você no controle de um helicóptero de ataque. Sua missão: chegar atrás das linhas inimigas e resgatar até 16 reféns por nível. Tenha cuidado, entretanto, porque os tanques e aviões inimigos tentarão pará-lo - e eles não irão parar de atirar enquanto você resgata os reféns!

game.name: Choplifter
game.desc: Choplifter é um jogo de ação / arcade de rolagem lateral que coloca você no controle de um helicóptero de ataque. game.name: Chopper I
game.desc: Pilot a helicopter in this vertically scrolling shooter from SNK.

game.name: Chopper I
game.desc: Pilot a helicopter in this vertically scrolling shooter from SNK.

game.name: Chopper I

game.name: Beraboh Man
game.desc:
Bravoman is a sentai parody action game.
The subtitle of this game translates from Japanese as 'Unequaled Man'.
This game is called 'Berabow Man' by Namco though this is likely a mistranslation as the later NEC PC-Engine port is called 'Bravoman'. The name 'BERABOW' appears in the default high score list.
In Stage 8, the main character from "Pistol-Shogun - Pistol Daimyo no Bouken" (which was released 2 years later) must be fought.
Bravoman did a cameo appearance in Namco x Capcom released for the Sony PS2 in 2005.

game.name: Beraboh Man
game.desc:

game.name: Legion: Spinner-87
game.desc: Pick up allies to form a powerful Legion against 'The Dark Empire'.

game.name: Legion: Spinner-87
game.desc: Pick up allies to form a powerful Legion against 'The Dark Empire'.

game.name: Ironclad
game.desc: O Ironclad é um shooter de rolagem lateral desenvolvido pela Saurus em 1996. Ironclad foi mostrado pela primeira vez em seu formato nativo de cartucho MVS na feira ACME de março de 1996 em Orlando, Flórida. Embora o jogo tenha sido lançado no sistema NEOGEO CD, nunca foi lançado oficialmente nos formatos de cartucho MVS ou HOME. Ironclad foi o mais procurado de todos os CD-protos devido ao seu apelo aos fãs de shoot 'em up. Isso era mais provável por coincidentemente ter causado o maior número de falsas alegações; mais do que qualquer outro cartucho protótipo! 13 anos depois, em novembro de 2009, a SNK finalmente liberou os dados nativos da ROM para o jogo e, como resultado, finalmente conseguimos o jogo e agora podemos aproveitá-lo para sempre!

game.desc: Chuka Taisen is a classic shooter starring the Monkey King Sun Wukong (except for Western releases, where the protagonist is "Mike Chen")

game.name: The Last Day
game.desc:
The Last Day is a vertically scrolling shoot-em-up.
In korea, this game as known as "D-day Chulguuk" (translates from Korean as 'D-day sortie').
Dooyong Industrial was established by Jung Jin Yook in the 80's. In its early days Dooyong made bootleg versions, and later made original games. Dooyong stopped to develop arcade games in 1996.
Very few last Day boards were exported to Japan.

game.name: Dragon World II
game.desc: A solitaire mahjong game where the object is to match 3 of a kind, using a limited amount of tiles.

game.name: Chuugokuryuu Pretty Chance [dragon World Pretty Chance]
game.desc: Mahjong matching series featuring sexy girl pictures in the background.

game.name: Circus Charlie
game.desc:
Circus Charlie é um jogo de plataforma abstrato para um jogador, no qual o jogador deve guiar o Charlie de mesmo nome por seis eventos circenses diferentes. Os pontos de bônus podem ser ganhos ao terminar um nível o mais rápido possível, com mais pontos concedidos por coletar qualquer um dos sacos de dinheiro que ocasionalmente aparecerem.
Finalmente, pontos de bônus adicionais são concedidos por completar um nível sem perder uma vida. O jogo termina quando todos os Circus Charlies estão perdidos.
Os seis eventos diferentes são:nnMonte em um leão e pule por aros de fogo e por panelas em chamas. Salte sobre macacos enquanto caminha na corda bamba. Salte em trampolins, evite respiradores de fogo e malabaristas de espadas. Pule em bolas de praia gigantes e rolantes. Andar a cavalo, evitando obstáculos. Trapézio.

game.name: Cisco Heat
game.desc: Neste jogo de corridas, os jogadores conduzem carros da polícia em vez dos habituais carros conduzidos por loucos por velocidade (como na série Crazy Cars). Infringe a lei em vez de a fazeres cumprir enquanto corres pelas ruas de São Francisco. Vê a Ponte Golden Gate, China Town e Twin Peaks, e evita colisões com eléctricos, outros carros (conduzidos por cidadãos irritantes), edifícios e bloqueios de estrada, enquanto tentas chegar ao próximo ponto de controlo antes que o tempo acabe! Usa a buzina para avisar os outros utentes da estrada da tua presença.

game.name: City Bomber
game.desc: City Bomber é um jogo de direção com rolagem vertical de alta velocidade e visão aérea, onde você tenta capturar criminosos.

game.name: City Bomber
game.desc: City Bomber é um jogo de direção com rolagem vertical de alta velocidade e visão aérea, onde você tenta capturar criminosos.

game.name: City Connection
game.desc: The player controls a small red car and dripping paint must jump between platforms to paint them in. Oil cans are collected and used to shoot at: police, taxis, ambulances and jeeps; that roam the levels. Catch 3 balloons to advance multiple levels. Cats must be avoided at all costs.

game.name: City Connection
game.desc: The player controls a small red car and dripping paint must jump between platforms to paint them in. Oil cans are collected and used to shoot at: police, taxis, ambulances and jeeps; that roam the levels. Catch 3 balloons to advance multiple levels. Cats must be avoided at all costs.

game.name: Clash-road
game.desc:
Clash Road is a Road Cycling racing game. The game utilizes a side-view of the racers and the track, which features various obstacles which the player must jump over or dodge. The first button is used to punch other cyclists while the second button is used for jumping.
The player has a Calorie meter on the top of the screen which acts as a stamina meter, slowly depleting during the race and also going down when the player runs into other cyclists and obstacles. The player can replenish the Calorie meter by collecting the various turtles, birds or the Cheer Girls running along the track.

game.name: Clash-road
game.desc:

The player has a Calorie meter on the top of the screen which acts as a stamina meter, slowly depleting during the race and also going down when the player runs into other cyclists and obstacles. game.name: Clay Pigeon
game.desc: The object of Clay Pigeon was to shoot as many clay targets as you can, using an arcade light gun that was shaped like a shotgun. At the start of the game you are given the choice of selecting either Trap Shooting or Skeet Shooting. Trap shooting is where the clay target is thrown directly away from the shooter, while in skeet shooting the target is launched across the shooter's field of vision. The graphics are done in Exidy's realistic style, each round is played against a decent looking outdoor background, and an extremely repetitive announcer yells 'pull' to warn you of each and every target being launched. After several rounds of targets, you finally get to go after some real live animals! The real live animals are of course, ducks! The ducks are small and fly onto the screen in small groups of up to around a half dozen or so, and unlike the earlier title "Vs. Duck Hunt", you cannot miss any of these. Missing any ducks in this round ends the game instantly, and will more than likely have you fumbling for another quarter in an attempt to do it right this time.

game.name: Cleopatra Fortune
game.desc: Cleopatra Fortune is a falling bricks puzzle game with an ancient Egyptian atmosphere. Features great music!

game.name: Cleopatra Fortune
game.desc: Cleopatra Fortune is a falling bricks puzzle game with an ancient Egyptian atmosphere. Features great music!

game.name: Cloak & Dagger
game.desc: O Agente X, completo com trenchcoat, gorro Bogie e maleta, corre através de uma série de aventuras e desventuras para recuperar planos roubados e destruir a fábrica de bombas subterrânea do dr. Boom. Nosso herói mascarado desce às profundezas do laboratório do Dr. Boom em um elevador especial. Em cada andar, ele encontra uma série de correias transportadoras que estão movendo explosivos. Uma bomba gigante marca os segundos do jogo, enquanto dispositivos da trama do Dr. Boom, como conversores de bomba, empilhadeiras desviando tiros para o Agente X, guardas de robôs, poços de ácido e olhos rastejantes disparando raios da morte, desafiando o (s) jogador (es).

game.name: Cloud 9
game.desc: Cloud 9 was an unreleased protoype from the early 80s. Shoot clouds, avoid rain, and try to destory the clouds before your screen floods!

game.name: Cluster Buster
game.desc: The ball is used to dislodge an ever-changing array of 'grapes' in this souped-up breakout proto-Arkanoid style game. Cluster Buster or Graplop was released in November 1983.

game.name: Clutch Hitter
game.desc:
Clutch Hitter is a baseball game originally released for Sega System 18 hardware before being ported to the Sega Game Gear. The Game Gear version was only released in North America.
There are noticeable differences between the Japanese and US versions of the arcade game - the US version has a MLB license and uses US teams, while the Japanese version opts for Japanese players and teams. There are also subtle changes to the presentation to reflect the two regions. A Chicken Leg, an enemy seen in Altered Beast and Golden Axe, makes a cameo appearance in the results screen.
Clutch Hitter is considered to be an entry in the Super League series of baseball games, directly inspiring the improvements Pro Yakyuu Super League '91 made to Super League.

game.name: Codename - Blut Engel
game.desc: Codename: Blut Engel é um homebrew insano de tiro vertical.

game.name: Codename - Blut Engel
game.desc: Codename: Blut Engel é um homebrew insano de tiro vertical.

game.name: Cobra-command
game.desc:
Your flies a heavily armored helicopter and your mission is blast your way through six stages (Sumatra, Java, Borneo, South China Sea, Siam, and Enemy HQ) and rescue the hostages.
Along the way, you can acquire upgrades for your guns, missiles, armor, engines, and rescue equipment (ropes, ladders). You'll need them, as swarms of enemy soldiers, artillery, tanks, choppers, jet fighters, and warships stand in your way.

game.name: Cobra Command
game.desc:
Mission... You have been ordered to get rid of a terrorist group which is committing crimes all over the world. Piloting your ultra-modern Jet Helicopter you have to confront your enemies. Carry out your mission!
You command a fully armed helicopter and must take on enemy helicopters, planes, tanks, and ships in order to destroy their stronghold on an area. Your missions take you though the forest, in the canyons, through the desert ruins, out to the pacific ocean, and right though New York City.

game.name: Lady Bug
game.desc: In Lady Bug you guide a lady bug through a Pac-Man style maze, eating dots, and avoiding enemy insects. You lose a life if you run into a skull or get eaten by an enemy insect. Collect letters to spell EXTRA for a bonus life (just like in Mr. Do!), and SPECIAL for an extra credit. The maze has rotating doors which are just enough to give the game a slightly different feel than the Pac-Man series.

game.name: Colony 7
game.desc:
In Colony 7 the player must defend Colony 7 from alien attack by either using the main weapons that fire shots, a Mega-Blaster which knocks out targets near the detonation zone, or with the Eradicator that acts as a smartbomb which clears the entire screen. There is an ion shield which provides temporary safety for the colony below, but can be blasted away by alien fire.
Colony 7 is in many ways a combination of two of the most popular shoot 'em up games of the time, containing elements of both Tehkan's Pleiads and Atari's Missile Command. The main innovation of Colony 7 was the extended weaponry arsenal. This gave the player the choice to change between several different weapons, with the the Eradicator needing to be purchased separately as "extended weaponry".

game.name: N.y. Captor
game.desc: You play a marksman who has to rescue hostages from terrorists. Fire upon enemies from your position, but avoid shooting the bystanders. After the last life has been lost, a sequence shows your character falling from his perch to his death.

game.name: Columns
game.desc: Columns é um jogo de quebra-cabeça estilo Tetris no qual você empilha jóias que estão caindo para criar uma corrente de três joias da mesma cor.

game.name: Columns
game.desc: Columns é um jogo de quebra-cabeça estilo Tetris no qual você empilha jóias que estão caindo para criar uma corrente de três joias da mesma cor.

game.name: Columns
game.desc: Columns é um jogo de quebra-cabeça estilo Tetris no qual você empilha jóias que estão caindo para criar uma corrente de três joias da mesma cor.

game.name: Columns II: The Voyage Through Time
game.desc:
Align 3 or more items of the same color vertically, horizontally or diagonally.
Columns II: The Voyage Through Time was the sequel to Columns. It featured the normal puzzle game play, but was only released in Japan in the arcades. It is not clear as to why it was subtitled "The Voyage Through Time", other than the minor tile differences which seem to attempt to indicate future and past ages: they are labeled as Machine Theme, Pale Green Theme, and Classic Theme.

game.name: Columns II: The Voyage Through Time

game.name: Combat
game.desc:
A shooting game with a military motif. The player uses a gun, mounted to the cabinet, to protect allies from a variety of dangers while attempting to break through and conquer enemy lines and get promoted to a higher rank (from Private to General Of The Army) and be awarded a campaign medal.
This game was known under Combat or Catch-22

game.name: Combat Hawk
game.desc: Combat Hawk is a reaction-based shoot-em-up in which the player takes on the role of an army soldier.

game.name: Combat School
game.desc: Combat School é um jogo do tipo Track & Field, mas com uma reviravolta militar. Jogas como Nick, um soldado motivado (e Joe no modo 2 jogadores) em busca de uma promoção. Por conseguinte, está inscrito no exército, o que lhe impõe testes mais ou menos difíceis e variados. Alguns são penalizantes e o sucesso é obrigatório, outros serão compensados por um teste de tracção extra para compensar a derrota, alguns como o braço de ferro não impõem qualquer penalização. Entre estes eventos encontrará saltos, tiroteios, braço de ferro, luta contra o instrutor, pull-ups e uma sequência de pancadas em todos eles. O jogo é difícil, mas a execução é bastante arrumada.

game.name: Come Back Toto
game.desc: Korean game. The game, which attempts to pass itself off as an original 1996 title by 'SoftClub' is actually a reskin of Toaplan's Snow Bros.

game.name: Command War - Super Special Battle & War Game
game.desc:
In this game, players control units and command them on a battlefield, where strategic thinking and quick decisions are essential to achieving victory. The game combines real-time action with strategic planning, requiring players to manage resources, position troops, and respond to enemy movements.
Each level introduces new missions and more challenging enemies, pushing players to develop advanced tactics as they progress. Command War is recognized for its dynamic mix of action and strategy, appealing to arcade fans who enjoy both fast-paced combat and thoughtful planning.

game.name: Commando
game.desc: Commando é um tiro de rolagem vertical em que o jogador assume o papel de um soldado de comando altamente treinado chamado "Super Joe", que começa o jogo por ser deixado em uma selva por um helicóptero. A missão de Joe é resgatar cativos e destruir as bases e fortalezas inimigas que aparecem no final de cada nível, matando tantos soldados inimigos quanto possível no processo.

game.name: Commando
game.desc: Commando is an early shoot'em up.

game.name: Commando

game.name: Comotion
game.desc: This game was for two or four players only, you must have a live human opponent to play against, or else the other players character will go straight into a wall, making for a very quick and boring game. Each player moves their character around leaving a solid line behind them. All moves are made on an invisible grid, so you can only turn at 90 degree angles. To win you must last longer than your opponents before hitting something. Each player is eliminated when they crash, taking their lines with them. One good strategy is to turn around and head for the outer area of the screen (in four player mode), because everyone starts out headed for the center. Skirt around the edges until you only have one opponent left, then box them in. Pushing backwards on the stick will cause you to crash into your own line, so avoid that at all cost.

game.name: Comotion
game.desc: This game was for two or four players only, you must have a live human opponent to play against, or else the other players character will go straight into a wall, making for a very quick and boring game. Each player moves their character around leaving a solid line behind them. All moves are made on an invisible grid, so you can only turn at 90 degree angles. To win you must last longer than your opponents before hitting something. Each player is eliminated when they crash, taking their lines with them. One good strategy is to turn around and head for the outer area of the screen (in four player mode), because everyone starts out headed for the center. Skirt around the edges until you only have one opponent left, then box them in. Pushing backwards on the stick will cause you to crash into your own line, so avoid that at all cost.

game.name: Competition Golf Final Round
game.desc: In Competition Golf Final Round, players can choose between different game modes, including single-player modes, multiplayer modes and tournaments. The game also features a selection of golf courses with varying levels of difficulty and landscapes. Players can control the direction, momentum and power of their shots to place the ball on the fairway and drive toward the hole. You need to consider the wind direction and speed as well as the topography of the golf course to plan your shots correctly. The game features realistic physics and graphics that provide an immersive gaming experience. Players can choose different golf clubs and use different strategies to improve their scores and win the tournament.

game.name: Competition Golf Final Round
game.desc: In Competition Golf Final Round, players can choose between different game modes, including single-player modes, multiplayer modes and tournaments. The game also features a selection of golf courses with varying levels of difficulty and landscapes. Players can control the direction, momentum and power of their shots to place the ball on the fairway and drive toward the hole. You need to consider the wind direction and speed as well as the topography of the golf course to plan your shots correctly. The game features realistic physics and graphics that provide an immersive gaming experience. Players can choose different golf clubs and use different strategies to improve their scores and win the tournament.

game.name: Complex X
game.desc:
Complex X is a classic arcade game that challenges players to navigate a labyrinthine maze filled with obstacles and enemies. The goal of the game is to reach the end of each level by finding and collecting a key that unlocks the exit door.
Players control a small, nimble spaceship that can move in any direction and shoot laser beams to defend against enemy attacks. The spaceship has a limited amount of fuel that must be replenished by collecting power-ups scattered throughout the maze. Players must also avoid colliding with walls or enemies, which can damage the spaceship and eventually lead to a game over.
As players progress through each level, the mazes become increasingly complex and challenging, with more enemies, tighter spaces, and trickier obstacles to navigate. There are also hidden bonuses and secret pathways that players can discover by exploring the maze thoroughly.

game.name: Phoenix
game.desc:
Phoenix is a classic vertical shoot-em-up in the mould of Taito's "Space Invaders" and Namco's "Galaxian", but takes the concept further with the introduction of progressive stages of play (instead of simply repeating a single playfield over and over with an increasing difficulty level).
According to Centuri's Joel Hochberg, the game was licensed from "a smaller Japanese developer." Amstar Electronics licensed the game to Centuri for manufacture in the United States. Taito released the game in Japan.

game.name: Phoenix

game.name: Congo Bongo
game.desc: Congo Bongo é um jogo de plataforma isométrico e é a versão da Sega do lendário "Donkey Kong" da Nintendo. O jogo começa com uma cena animada mostrando o gorila Bongo enquanto ele se aproxima do acampamento de um caçador de safári adormecido e incendeia sua barraca. O jogador assume o papel do caçador que jurou vingança contra Bongo por esta brincadeira cruel.

game.name: Congo Bongo
game.desc: Congo Bongo é um jogo de plataforma isométrico e é a versão da Sega do lendário "Donkey Kong" da Nintendo. game.name: Continental Circus
game.desc: Continental Circus é um jogo de corridas de Fórmula 1 em que o jogador corre em vários circuitos do Grande Prémio Internacional, tentando completar cada volta antes do fim do tempo limite. O jogo apresenta pit stops e tempo dinâmico, este último sob a forma de chuva. nnSe o carro do jogador for atropelado por um carro rival ou bater com uma barreira na pista, o carro será danificado e começará a fumar. O jogador tem de fazer um buraco o mais rápido possível para reparar o carro, caso contrário o fogo alastrará e o carro explodirá. Se o carro do jogador sofrer uma segunda colisão antes de chegar à paragem nas boxes, o carro explodirá, perdendo tempo precioso antes de aparecer um carro de substituição.

game.name: Contra
game.desc:
Em 2631, um meteorito atinge o arquipélago de Galuga, perto da Nova Zelândia, levando consigo um ser alienígena adormecido. Dois anos depois, uma organização terrorista que se autodenomina Red Falcon assume a ilha como parte de sua trama para invadir a Terra. Bill Rizer e Lance Bean, da unidade Contra, são enviados para a ilha da Oceania para impedir a ameaça do mal.
'Contra' é um agitado shoot-em-up de plataforma para um ou dois jogadores com 10 estágios. Além dos níveis de visão lateral padrão, há também estágios de "labirinto 3D", nos quais o jogador deve passar por uma série de corredores dentro de uma base inimiga, destruindo vários sensores, a fim de alcançar o núcleo da base.

game.name: Contra
game.desc:
Em 2631, um meteorito atinge o arquipélago de Galuga, perto da Nova Zelândia, levando consigo um ser alienígena adormecido. Dois anos depois, uma organização terrorista que se autodenomina Red Falcon assume a ilha como parte de sua trama para invadir a Terra. Bill Rizer e Lance Bean, da unidade Contra, são enviados para a ilha da Oceania para impedir a ameaça do mal.
'Contra' é um agitado shoot-em-up de plataforma para um ou dois jogadores com 10 estágios. Além dos níveis de visão lateral padrão, há também estágios de "labirinto 3D", nos quais o jogador deve passar por uma série de corredores dentro de uma base inimiga, destruindo vários sensores, a fim de alcançar o núcleo da base.

game.name: Cool Minigame Collection
game.desc: It is a copy of sorts of the Bishi Bashi series by Konami, which has the players compete against each other in various wacky-looking minigames. The ones in Cool Minigame Collection, however, are stranger and even cruder. They include squishing insects and floor monsters with a hammer, throwing chalk at sleepy students, and playing rock paper scissors with prison wardens.

game.name: Cop 01
game.desc: You take control of rookie detective James with Police Precinct 1, infiltrate the secretive Specter organization's hidden base, and rescue their kidnapped partner Stacy as the goal. Fight your way through the countless enemies in the hidden base using both your normal jump and the higher “Rocket Jump” performed using a limited gauge!

game.name: Cop 01

Fight your way through the countless enemies in the hidden base using both your normal jump and the higher “Rocket Jump” performed using a limited gauge!

game.name: Cosmic Avenger
game.desc:
An early space shoot'em up game.
How to Play: Your Avenger can be moved in 8 directions. The speed increases as it advances, while it decreases as it retreats. Destroy the front enemy by pressing the Fire Button, and destroy the target below by pressing the Bomb Button. The enemy UFO will assault you flying either from in front of you or from behind you. You can locate it by using the radar. A tough chase missile will pursue your Avenger persistently. Dodge it successfully, and you can cause the enemy to fight among themselves. When you pass the enemy radar site, an ant-aircraft gun will fire at your according to the altitude of your Avenger. When the screen advances further, the X station will appear. When you destroy it in good time, you can destroy all the targets appearing on the screen at once. You are then awarded a high score. Your Avenger will be destroyed when it is affected by any explosion. The 1st â€“ 5th highest scores for the day can enter their names on the screen.

game.name: Cosmic Cop
game.desc: Hi-octane side-scrolling action, a spin-off from the popular R-Type series

game.name: Cosmo Gang The Puzzle
game.desc: Cosmo Gang - The Puzzle is a puzzle game, different combinations of blocks mixed with Cosmo Gang members fall from the top to the bottom of the screen. The object is to stack up the blocks to form a complete row causing that row to disappear. To accomplish this a ball must be used to eliminate the Cosmo Gang that stacked up to block your progress.

game.name: Cosmo Gang The Puzzle
game.desc: Cosmo Gang - The Puzzle is a puzzle game, different combinations of blocks mixed with Cosmo Gang members fall from the top to the bottom of the screen. The object is to stack up the blocks to form a complete row causing that row to disappear. To accomplish this a ball must be used to eliminate the Cosmo Gang that stacked up to block your progress.

game.name: Cosmo Gang The Video
game.desc: Defend against the Cosmo Gang baddies which enter in patterns and join an attack formation. Keep the baddies from stealing energy in the challenging stages.

game.name: Cosmo Police Galivan
game.desc:
Galivan is a single player platform shoot-em-up in which the player takes on the roll of a 'Cosmo Police' officer who runs and jumps around a multi-directional scrolling cave system, destroying or avoiding waves of constantly attacking robots, aliens and alien ships.
The player starts the game as an unarmed human, whose only attacking options are kicking and punching, but picking up a POW item encases the human in a robotic suit and arms the player with a laser gun.
Collecting the blue POW items while in the suit awards the player with a powerful beam weapon for a limited time, while the red POW item gives the player a three-shot cannon. POW items are dotted throughout the levels and can also be gained by shooting the blue robot aliens.
The player's character has an energy bar that decreases whenever the player is hit. Should this fall below the halfway point, the robot suit will be lost and the player will once again be an unarmed human.
Collecting a POW item while in human form will restore the player's energy. If a POW is collected while wearing the suit, however, the player's energy will NOT be increased but their weapon will receive a power-up.
The game's platforms are littered with springboards that fire the player high into the air when stepped on. Some platforms - often containing POW items - can only be reached via a springboard.

game.name: Loco-motion
game.desc: Loco-Motion é um jogo de arcade no estilo de quebra-cabeça, no qual um trem está montado em uma grade de peças de pista móveis. O objetivo é guiar o trem pelas estações de trem localizadas ao redor da borda do campo de jogos. Uma seção vazia na grade permite que o jogador troque peças de pista adjacentes para aquela seção para alterar o caminho do trem, e uma luz de rastreamento mostra o caminho que o trem está seguindo enquanto se move. Um botão do acelerador move o trem mais rapidamente em seu caminho, e um botão de pânico muda a faixa de trilho em que o trem está com uma faixa aleatória na grade.

game.name: Cotton: Fantastic Night Dreams
game.desc: Cotton is a shooter starring a cute, moderately psychotic witch and a fairy. It was originally an arcade game, released in Japan in 1991; it was ported to many other platforms.

game.name: Counter Run
game.desc: In this maze game, You are a car in a labyrinth that must eat all the dots while evading the other cars who pursue you.

game.name: Country Club
game.desc: A golf game.

game.name: Crouching Pony Hidden Dragon
game.desc: CPHD é um shooter com recursos de RPG exclusivos para o Neo-Geo. Colete dinheiro e experiência para evoluir suas armas e equipamentos. Enfrente hordas de ninjas, shaolins, gueixas ... em luta intensa para ganhar sua imortalidade.

game.name: Frog Feast
game.desc: Frog Feast é um jogo caseiro e uma adaptação do jogo para Intellivision "Frog Bog". O conceito do jogo é bem simples: 2 rãs que precisam comer o máximo de insetos possível em um tempo limitado.

game.name: Crack Down
game.desc:
Uma cidade futurista foi tomada por um poderoso exército biomecânico; criado por um cientista do mal em uma tentativa de dominar o mundo. 2 agentes de elite devem plantar uma série de bombas-relógio para destruir sua base e esmagar a rebelião.
A ação de atirar em 1 ou 2 jogadores é exibida através de uma tela dividida inovadora que permite que 2 jogadores trabalhem individualmente ou em equipe. Um temporizador de contagem regressiva aumenta a tensão. As bombas-relógio devem ser definidas correndo sobre áreas marcadas com um 'X'; enquanto metralhadoras e canhões podem ser recarregados, encontrando os caches de munição que aparecem em cada nível. Se a munição acabar, os jogadores deverão resultar em socos e chutes para derrotar os oponentes.

game.name: Crackshot
game.desc: A First-person shoot'em up gallery style game. A player must use his skill to shoot a number of 'good' targets, while not shooting the 'bad' ones, before time runs out. The game has several levels including a bar, Varmit Alley, Bank Robbers, Robots, Birds, outer space, Bank robbers again and a Bonus 'Slot machine' level.

game.name: Crash
game.desc: Crash is a two-dimensional maze racing game designed and programmed by Edward Valeau of Exidy in 1979. You "control" a car with no brakes which moves at either slow or fast speed through a maze containing dots. At the same time, one or more computer controlled cars run through the same maze in the opposite direction with the intention of ramming you. At each of four junctions in the maze, you have the option of changing lanes to avoid the oncoming cars. The objective is to pick up all the dots before the computer takes you out.

game.name: Crayon Shinchan Orato Asobo
game.desc: Crayon Shin-chan - Ora To Asobois a fun collection of mini-games including Quiz, Tug of War and many more.

game.name: Crazy Balloon
game.desc:
Crazy Balloon is a game of strategy and skill! The object of Crazy Balloon is to guide a delicate swaying balloon through a maze of pin wheel obstacles.
You have 4 control buttons and you have the ability to move your balloon in any direction. Don't take too long, because if you are too slow, a bogey man erupts on the screen and forces you to move. Just when you think you have the maze all figured out, pin wheels attack your balloon forcing you to take evasive action.

game.name: Mr. Jong
game.desc: A puzzle game.

game.name: Crazy Climber
game.desc: Crazy Climber is a 2-D, strategy style game. The game is strategic in the fact that you must plan your moves as you climb up the building and anticipate the hazards that await you. You start out the game at the bottom of a building to be scaled. As you climb up the building, you will be assailed by bald people throwing flowerpots, signs with loose electrical wires, very large apes, falling signs, trash and barbells, and a bird that likes to drop bad things on your character. Your goal is to make it to the top of the building and catch the helicopter, which will transport you to the next building to be scaled. Of course, you will be rewarded for quickly making it up the building by getting a bonus (that is as long as you can catch the helicopter). The things one does for publicity.

game.name: Crazy Climber 2
game.desc: Using 2 joysticks, the player climbs up the face of high-rise buildings, avoiding closing windows, falling objects, cranes, birds, laundry, gorillas, etc. Reach the top of the building and catch a ride on a helicopter over to next building.

game.name: Gang Busters
game.desc: Prenda criminosos enquanto abate centenas de outros neste shooter da Konami.

game.name: Crazy Fight
game.desc: Players shoot at on-screen enemies while trying not to hit the hostages throughout 6 different stages of action.

game.name: Crazy Kong
game.desc: Is an arcade game developed by Falcon, released in 1981 and is similar to Nintendo's Donkey Kong. Although commonly believed to be a bootleg version, the game was officially licensed for operation only in Japan when Nintendo couldn't keep up with demand at home (even though Donkey Kong was still released there),[1] and is based on different hardware. The game retains all of the gameplay elements of Donkey Kong, but has all of the graphics redrawn and re-colorized. It is also known with four names: Congorilla, Big Kong, Donkey King, and Monkey Donkey.

game.name: Crazy Rally
game.desc: A top-down, vertical scrolling racing game in the style of other rally games. The route consists of three stages with a variety of obstacles including tight turns, accidents on the highway and oncoming traffic. Rival cars perform special attacks including smoke clouds and spraying oil slicks on the road.

game.name: Crazy War
game.desc: 'Crazy War' is a video game revolving around an epic battle between the Coalition of Planets, and the evil Devilion Empire. In the year 544 the Devilion Empire has invaded the calm galaxy to expand its territory. The Coalition of Planets has selected seven special personnel to fight the Devilion Empire, and the player takes on the role of one of these seven, embarking on a mission to destroy the Devilion Empire's Evil Stone. The mission is completed over 13 levels. Crazy War is a video game for 1 or 2 players. In 1-player mode, become one of the 7 special personnel and perform your role to destroy the Evil Stone. In 2-player mode, both players fight against each other.

game.name: Moon Cresta
game.desc: O jogador deve mover a sua nave à medida que surgem ondas de extraterrestres na base do ecrã. Os alienígenas amarelos partem-se quando são atingidos, enquanto os alienígenas magenta são os mais difíceis. Quando o caminho estiver livre, o jogador deve tentar atracar a sua nave manualmente dentro de um determinado tempo. Uma vez atracada com sucesso, o jogador ganha pontos de bónus.

game.name: Crime City
game.desc:
Crime City is a side-scrolling platform shoot-em-up for one or two players in which two cops by the names of Tony Gibson and Raymond Brody are tasked with taking down the gangs of criminals that have overrun their city.
Each of the game's six stages focuses on a specific criminal activity, such as bank robbery or smuggling. The goal of each stage is to reach the powerful 'boss' character then defeat and arrest them.

game.name: Crime City
game.desc:
Crime City is a side-scrolling platform shoot-em-up for one or two players in which two cops by the names of Tony Gibson and Raymond Brody are tasked with taking down the gangs of criminals that have overrun their city.
Each of the game's six stages focuses on a specific criminal activity, such as bank robbery or smuggling. The goal of each stage is to reach the powerful 'boss' character then defeat and arrest them.

game.name: Crime Fighters
game.desc:
Crime Fighters é um jogo de fliperama onde sua missão é resgatar várias mulheres que foram sequestradas por um chefe do crime e limpar as ruas espancando o maior número possível de membros de gangues com suas próprias mãos, assim como qualquer outra coisa que você pode descobrir. Você viajará por oito níveis por toda a cidade, em locais que variam do metrô às docas.
No final de cada etapa, há uma briga com um personagem chefe, muitos dos quais são imitações de antagonistas de filmes de terror famosos como Freddy Kruger e Jason Voorhees. A pontuação é feita por um sistema em que você simplesmente ganha um ponto por cada inimigo que mata. Ocasionalmente, aparecem exemplos da física dos desenhos animados, como quando seu personagem é esmagado por um rolo compressor em movimento ou um outdoor caindo.

game.name: Vendetta
game.desc:
Em Vendetta, você controla um dos membros da gangue The Cobras, que é composta por: Hawk (ex-profissional de luta livre, com forte semelhança com o Hulk Hogan), Boomer (um artista marcial, possivelmente baseado em Jean Claude Van Damme), Blood (ex-lutador, com uma leve semelhança com Mike Tyson), Sledge (um militar ex-presidiário com leve semelhança a Mr. T), e Kate, a dama em perigo e protegida de Hawk.
Esta última foi raptada por outra gangue, a Dead End, liderada por Faust, que domina Dead End City e quer expandir o seu território. Os quatro homens da gangue partem para salvá-la e lutam contra a horda de inimigos que são enviados contra eles.

game.name: Vendetta
game.desc:
